author: Michele M.
review: Our 55+ community in Bellingham had two previous property management companies before Integra. Our HOA Board was very dissatisfied with those two previous companies; and very satisfied with Integra. As an owner, I have been impressed by

author: NJ GP
review: I have had very good experiences with the Integra office over 3+ years .Have called 3-4 times about issues which were handled effectively, promptly and well. The latest rate of response was-same day-impressive.

author: OnTheRoadAgain
review: Yes, yes, yes! Sadie Sullivan, the absolute most unprofessional of the bunch. No clue how to speak to homeowners. Thank you so much to all of the other reviewers who are posting about their negative experiences with this company. I am

author: Mareyoko Butler
review: I rented a condo in birch bay through Integra years ago and had the WORST experience I have EVER had with any kind of business of that kind. I always look back on it and laugh at the irony of their name. From my experience they are

author: Kat DeVaney
review: We have had multiple interactions with Integra in which they have lost keys, blamed us for it, yelled at us and then told US that we were unprofessional, incorrectly identified who the owners of the property were, and generally have been

ownerResponse.text:
It is unfortunate that you lost your keys.  As we tried to explain, we have never had keys to your unit as it was on the master system and we had no need of them.  A key for you was located with the Board of Directors, of which you were already aware.

The Owners of the unit were correctly identified and are concurrent with those on the recorded title.  We cannot just add names to the account unless such is supported by legally recorded documents.

Unfortunately when your significant other was in our office, none of these answers were satisfactory for him.  He made his displeasure loudly known while exiting.

In response to your recent post about INTEGRA dropping the Association if you were on the Board, this is VERY interesting as you WERE on the 2019 ballot for the Board and the MEMBERSHIP rejected you NOT INTEGRA.

author: Jenna Ruud
review: The women here were lovely and helpful. And very cool office, too

ownerResponse.text: Thank you!!  Always happy to help!

author: Dee Brown
review:
Awful company. I couldn't agree more with the previous reviewers.

I deal with Integra as a tenant. They have threatened to evict me and have also

author: Ed DeVaney
review:
In response to Integra's response to Kat DeVaney:
Your response is simply false. It is plain you have no problem being dishonest with your customers. At your company's request, to accommodate fire inspections

author: Pres Play
review: I'll preface by saying, based on my recent encounter with Integra I was quite shocked to see all the negative reviews. I can only presume that my positive experience with Integra is perhaps a result of that feedback and reflection on how a

author: Ms Down to earth
review: I talked with Tess on the phone because I am in the process of buying a condo under her management. She was rude and seemed to resent answering my questions. Finally she told me she gets paid for answering questions. My mortgage broker

author: Erin Smith
review: I couldn't agree more with the other reviews!  This company has the absolute worst customer service I have ever experienced.  They don't seem to understand who the customer is and how they get paid.  They are horribly rude on the phone when

author: Scott Brown
review: I am a long term Board Member of an HOA in Blaine Wa. I and our association have been associated with Integra and Tess and Cindy Rae for more than 10 years as our Property Managers. We  have always found them to be very professional, extremely helpful and experts in providing the oversite and planning we require.

author: Zach Dugan
review: I have never felt so awful about customer service than I have with this company. In particular one person Sadie Sullivan, the way I was treated by her was incomprehensible. I was simply trying to resolve an issue and she consistently talked down to me and even raised her voice towards me. STAY AWAY

author: Taf Kama
review: My experience with Integra has been awful. Their front desk desk staff members are rude and full of excuses. They have no real interest in helping condo owners and instead will look for any opportunity to deflect responsibility away from

author: caleb young
review: I don't even want to give them a star!  And after reading their 'mission statement' I wonder what they are supposed to do for us, unless being super disrespectful is one of their tenets. Someone at the company  told us to do something, then

author: Richard Huizenga
review: Over the years Integra and I have worked together. All experiences with the staff have been professional, ethical and organized. They are great people and skilled at there services.

author: Michael Bell
review: Read the other reviews, they are all 100% on point. How does it reflect on an HOA that every single review of their organization is scathingly negative?

author: Tim Heredia
review: I have tried to contact manager several times within the past two years,  left my phone number requesting call back , she has not returned any of my calls , receptionist always states she is out to lunch or in a meeting , called this time due to fire issue , no return call again , not very professional of this management company .

author: Jasmine Munro
review:
Sorry to say this, but don't do any business with them. Don't trust their websites because it's not true.
The stuffs are rude on the phone/in person. Unprofessional.
My advice is be far away from them.

author: Samuel Conrad
review: Have rented from them for 3 years now, easy to deal with.

author: Tim Adkins
review: Be very careful before doing any business with this company. Ironically named.

author: Max Archer
review: Great management company.
